sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73352" key="*)olumpio/nikos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ὀλυμπιό-νῑκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73352.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">victorious in the Olympic games,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.21</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
